qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.GruposParametros.GROUP.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT WRK07_GROUPS.oi_group as ID, WRK07_GROUPS.c_group as COD, WRK07_GROUPS.d_group as DES, WRK07_GROUPS.c_group as c_group, WRK07_GROUPS.d_group as d_group FROM WRK07_GROUPS WHERE WRK07_GROUPS.oi_group in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.GruposParametros.GRP_PARAM.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT WRK07_PARAMS.oi_grp_param as ID, WRK07_PARAMS.d_value as d_value, WRK07_PARAMS.d_value_debug as d_value_debug, WRK06_PARAMS.c_param as COD, WRK06_PARAMS.d_param as DES, WRK06_PARAMS.d_param as DES_oi_param FROM WRK07_PARAMS, WRK06_PARAMS JOIN WRK07_PARAMS.oi_param LEFT OUTER WRK06_PARAMS.oi_param WHERE WRK07_PARAMS.oi_grp_param in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
